microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end technical delivery for enterprise accounts (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), translating customer requirements into shipped configurations and integrations that scaled Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person effort into a **platformized system** driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Built an internal **AI agent** and restructured planning workflows to reduce planning cycle time **39%** and increase drill capacity **21%**, scaling team leverage while managing multiple enterprise workstreams simultaneously.
Flagged recurring customer needs back to Product as platform gaps, turning repeated field requirements into self-service features that improved the product for every enterprise account.
